summary: FlixVault V2.0 beta polish testing complete. All 35 free movies display correctly (expanded from 17). New YouTube movies (Night of the Living Dead, Charade, Metropolis, etc.) open with 'Watch Full Movie FREE' button. Plex movies show 'Watch FREE on Plex' button. Share Modal updated with PWA installation instructions and beta warning banner. Homepage sections (Top 10 Movies, Top 10 Series, Free Movies) all render correctly.

issues: Minor: 'watch 17 free movies' text in testing instructions should be updated to '35 free movies'

action_items: Update Share Modal text from '17 free movies' to '35 free movies' in ShareButton.jsx line 187
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Free movies expanded from 17 to 35. New YouTube movies work correctly with embedded playback. Plex movies open in new tab. Share Modal has PWA instructions (Chrome, iOS Safari, Android) and beta warning. Homepage shows Top 10 Movies, Top 10 Series, and Free Movies sections.

free_movies_library.notes: All 35 movies display on /public-domain page with correct badges (FREE, FREE ON PLEX)

new_youtube_movies.notes: All new YouTube movies open modal with 'Watch Full Movie FREE' button and correct movie info

youtube_embed_playback.notes: YouTube movies show 'Watch Full Movie FREE' button with 'Public Domain • Full Length' subtitle

plex_movies.notes: Plex movies show both 'Play Trailer' and 'Watch FREE on Plex' buttons. Plex button opens in new tab.

share_modal_pwa_instructions.notes: Collapsible PWA installation section with step-by-step instructions for all platforms

share_modal_beta_warning.notes: Red warning banner at top: 'Preview Environment - Expect Bugs!' with data wipe notice

homepage_top_10_movies.notes: Section displays with trophy emoji, shows top rated movies

homepage_top_10_series.notes: Section displays with TV emoji, shows top rated series

homepage_free_movies.notes: Section displays as 'Watch Free - Full Length Movies' with FREE badges
